Implement theme system (Light / Dark / System default)

Wires the existing Settings > Theme dropdown to actual visual changes:
- Four CoffeeSettings colour accessors (ThemePanelBg, ThemeTextColor,
  ThemeDimTextColor, ThemeOutlineColor) return palette values per theme
- SyncAllWindows() broadcasts MSG_THEME_CHANGED to all open windows
- Custom Draw() methods (ParticleGaugeView, SieveDistView, CalHistView,
  ExtractionBarView, RoastGaugeView, ThumbView) use theme colours for
  backgrounds, outlines, tick marks, and labels
- BTextView tips areas update view/text colour on MSG_THEME_CHANGED and
  in constructors so newly opened windows inherit the active theme
- Coffee-colour gradients and extraction zone colours are unchanged

commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

Narrative text was silently assigned to wrong pages — GPT-4o returned 0-based indices into the description list, but assign_narrative_to_pages treated them as absolute page indices, putting text on cover/dedication pages that never render quotes. Fixed by using sequential indices in descriptions with a back-mapping to absolute page positions. 2. Video rendering crashed because Remotion's

commit.message:
fix(e2e): use e2e_force_onboarding flag to bypass wizard auto-skip

The previous approach of removing e2e_auto_auth broke because page.goto
does a full reload that requires e2e_auto_auth for login bypass. Instead,
add a dedicated e2e_force_onboarding flag that tells the wizard to show
even when e2e_auto_auth is present.

commit.message:
feat: NaN-aware interpolation, auto-warp mask, ROI import with file browser

Backend:
- Add NaN-aware bilinear interpolation (nan_interp.py), replacing cv2.remap
  to eliminate boundary contamination at valid/invalid pixel boundaries
- Full-image coordinate accumulation in controller.py: kf_accumulated is now
  (H_full, W_full, 2) with NaN outside ROI, enabling correct cross-region
  displacement sampling
- Stable auto-warp mask via warp_mask_with_holes on full-image accumulated
  displacement, with fallback chain: user mask > auto-warp > original ROI
- ROI import endpoint enhanced with min_area filtering (connected components)
  and Gaussian smoothing; imported masks auto-confirm for immediate Run
- validate-masks reports has_frame_1; new apply-frame1-mask endpoint
- Propagate envelope_rect through session and render pipeline

Frontend:
- ROI import dialog redesigned: file browser (Phase 1) + floating adjust
  panel with real-time sliders for blob removal and edge smoothing (Phase 2)
- Path bar supports paste + Enter for direct folder navigation
- Mask source labels: "Auto (warp ROI)" / "Custom (load folder)"
- MaskSourceSelector shows Frame 1 status, Apply as ROI button, and
  unmatched key frame warnings
- Imported masks auto-confirm ROI so Run button is immediately enabled

Tests: 198 passed (28 comprehensive displacement tests covering complex ROI
shapes, non-uniform fields, large deformation, multi-step accumulation,
NaN interpolation edge cases, and resolve_mask fallback chain)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: Era 75 — Semantic Memory Layer with vector search (#238)

Three-layer memory architecture: session (ephemeral), project (JSONL), semantic (vector index).

- Added /memory-search: natural language queries over indexed memories with relevance scores
- Added /memory-index: rebuild semantic vector index from agent-notes, lessons, decisions, postmortems
- Added /memory-stats: index statistics and coverage metrics
- semantic-memory skill: lightweight JSON-based vector store, embedding search, incremental updates

Index storage: data/memory-index/{project}.json. No external database required.

commit.message:
fix: use continue-on-error for app token generation in release workflow

The secrets context cannot be compared in if-expressions without causing
a workflow parse error. Use continue-on-error instead so the step fails
gracefully when secrets are not configured, and the fallback to
GITHUB_TOKEN handles it.

Create push.js with applyPush/removePush for managing <html> padding.
Integrate into dom.js (position: sticky vs fixed based on push mode)
and main.js (wire push state into init/teardown/dismiss lifecycle).

16 tests covering: zero/non-zero existing padding, config.push=false,
bottom position, destroy/dismiss restoring padding, third-party padding
changes, negative clamp, position sticky vs fixed on banner host.
Bump gzip budget from 5632 to 6144 for push.js module.

Redesign: light editorial mode — Outfit typography, spec-sheet projects

Swap dark #0a0a0a palette for warm cream (#f5f4f0), replace Fraunces with
Outfit 300 throughout. Hero recomposed as editorial studio statement.
Projects reworked from card grid to numbered horizontal-rule list rows.
Contact simplified to single-column link rows. Mesa and Kuuki wired to
live URLs. Scroll animation fixed to exclude hero section.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Feature/rate limiter bot protection (#2)

* feat(auth): add rate limiting, Cloudflare Turnstile, and brute-force protection

- Add registration-specific rate limiter (5/hr/IP) for register and Google OAuth endpoints
- Add Cloudflare Turnstile invisible bot challenge on web login and registration forms
- Add per-username brute-force protection with progressive lockout (5 fails: 30s, 10: 5min, 15: 30min)
- Add X-Client-Platform header on mobile to bypass Turnstile (mobile relies on rate limiting + Google token validation)
- Graceful dev mode: all protection passes through when Turnstile keys are not configured
- Add i18n keys for captcha, rate limit, and lockout error messages (en + zh-CN)
- Document architecture and setup in docs/rate-limiting-bot-protection.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Add Cloudflare Turnstile test keys with setup instructions
- Add Google OAuth and admin placeholder sections
- Replace hardcoded test credentials with safe placeholders
- Fix VITE_API_URL port to match backend default (9876)

commit.message:
이메일 리포트 실제 데이터 전송 + Instagram API user_id 수정 + 기간 설정 + 감성분석 3개 API 종합

- 이메일: 프론트에서 이미 생성된 리포트 데이터를 report_data로 전달하여 재생성 없이 전송
- 이메일: _build_report_html() 함수로 구조화된 HTML 생성 (KPI 테이블, 인사이트, 추천사항)
- Instagram: ig_hashtag_search에 필수 user_id 파라미터 추가 (me/accounts에서 IG Business Account 조회)
- Instagram: recent_media에서 좋아요/댓글/해시태그 수집
- 감성분석: YouTube(좋아요) + Instagram(좋아요/댓글) + Naver(블로그 제목 키워드) 3개 API 종합
- 해시태그: YouTube 태그 + Instagram 캡션 해시태그 종합 후 빈도순 정렬
- 기간 설정: 7일/14일/30일/60일/90일/180일 선택 가능 (Naver DataLab 기간 반영)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Currency selector now multi-select

Clients can select multiple currencies (e.g., ZAR + USD for
international businesses). Primary currency = first selected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: cap SOL sell amount to preserve gas reserve lamports

When selling SOL, Jupiter draws from the same lamport balance used for tx fees.
If prior trades consumed gas, the requested sell amount could exceed the live
balance, failing simulation with "insufficient lamports". Now fetches live SOL
balance before any SOL sell and caps rawAmount to (balance - MIN_SOL_FOR_GAS).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
